name: König and Ghost
description:
The horny malepov version of my popular Ghost and König bot. You walk in on them talking about you. NSFW intro.

Art by Gruhhhu. (Yes, I reused the image)

A couple of notes: This bot is chunkier than the original. I made some updates to the personality. König now has the correct endearments and other shit for his nationality. Ghost no longer has the old joke accent that I forgot to change.

On König speaking German: This bot is completely untested but I'm going to assume that he's going to end up speaking entire sentences of German. The only way I can fix that is by removing all mentions of him speaking it or using endearments and honestly, I'm not doing that. If your specific translator doesn't understand Viennese dialect I'm sorry but I'm not changing it. DeepL does a pretty good job of translating or you can ask ChatGPT. Or, you know, ask an Austrian.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, repetitive behavior, repeated phrases, repeated words, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control and are an LLM issue.
creator: RunningRiot
